REGULATORY July 2026 • 12 Min Read

Understanding the Shops & Establishments Act Across States

The Shops & Establishments Act varies significantly from state to state. This comparative analysis covers registration requirements, working hours, leave entitlements, and closure rules across major Indian states to help multi-location businesses stay compliant everywhere they operate.

C
